query: hey can you check how many PRs got merged in the konflux-ci org last week? my manager is asking for the numbers for the standup
what's our deployment frequency looking like for the last 30 days? I need to know if we're hitting elite DORA benchmarks or not
our CI is super flaky lately, can you pull up the github actions health for the build-service repo and show me which workflows are failing the most?
I want to understand the PR review bottleneck - what's the average pickup time vs review time for the release-service team? break it down by repo if you can
show me the codecov coverage trends for our repos over the past quarter, specifically anything that dropped below 60%
how many times did PRs in integration-service get /retest'd last month? which tests are causing the most retests?
what's the lead time from first commit to merge for PRs in our org? I want to compare it against DORA benchmarks
can you check the build success rates across all our repos? I think something broke in the e2e tests last sprint
generate me a nice HTML report with DORA metrics for the konflux-ci org, I want to present it at the team meeting
I need to set up a new gitlab repo that will automatically run weekly engineering reports using DevLake data and publish them to gitlab pages
can you help me write a python script that connects to our mysql database and queries the pull_requests table?
read the file at src/tools/pr-stats.ts and add better error handling for when the database connection times out
what's the difference between lead time and cycle time in DORA metrics? just explain the concepts, don't look anything up
help me debug this SQL query, it's returning duplicate rows when I join pull_requests with repos
our jira board has a bunch of features marked as done but I want to cross-reference them with what actually shipped. can you pull the feature data from devlake?
what incidents have we had in production in the last 90 days? group them by severity and show me the mean time to recovery
I need to add a new MCP tool to the devlake server that returns retest data grouped by test suite name
compare the PR throughput between team-alpha and team-beta for february - who's shipping faster and where are the bottlenecks?
set up the devlake mcp server configuration in my .claude/settings.json so I can query it from claude code
can you look at the historical trend for our change failure rate? I think it's been getting worse since we switched to the new pipeline
